engine.ladder_reasoning: The visitor is evaluating construction machinery (excavators, loaders, dump trucks) via product-category tiles and per-model spec tables — the decision is about the machines' features/specs, not about trusting a named professional's expertise. Company history/mission are dealer credibility, but the spine is a product catalog.

goal.one_action: submit a product enquiry (name, mobile, email, subject, message)

structure.archetype_note: Classic multipage dealer brochure: home hero + product grid + news + testimonials, About company story, per-category product spec pages, and a contact enquiry form.

mapped.observed_as: We Offer Smarter & More Affordable Construction Machineries
BUILD TO LAST / Engineered to perform

unmapped.observed: NEWS & EVENTS (dealership award, office inauguration, Bhoomi Pooja)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A dated dealer-activity news feed is neither a blog article index nor socialProof; it is company-activity announcements

confidence.why: fetch_quality is partial and the homepage HTML is compromised with ~114 injected spam links; the underlying legitimate dealer structure is clear across pages, but capture safety/completeness is capped.

gap_findings: Product-category → per-model spec-table catalog (excavators with RPM/power/operating-weight specs) is a browse-then-enquire pattern; 'catalog' covers browse but the spec-table-per-model detail component is unrepresented.
A dated company NEWS & EVENTS feed (awards, inaugurations, ceremonies) has no canonical section id — mapped to miscellaneous but is a recurring SMB-brochure pattern.
